zh: 这个办公室是你的，左边是经理办公室，右边是会议室。
en: This office is yours, the manager's office is on the left, and the meeting room is on the right.

zh: 好啊，我很喜欢看演出。都有些什么节目呢?
en: Sure, I really enjoy watching performances. What kind of programs do they have?

zh: 你跟经理提出我们的要求时，他怎么说?
en: What did the manager say when you brought up our request?

zh: 你们的表演非常精彩!
en: Your performance was wonderful!

zh: 我昨天才到，估计在这待一个星期吧。
en: I just arrived yesterday. I estimate I'll be here for a week.

zh: 老刘，看你这么高兴，是不是遇到了什么喜事啊?
en: Old Liu, you look so happy, did something good happen?

zh: 你看过《赤壁》这部电影吗?
en: Have you watched the movie 'Red Cliff'?

zh: 你说说，怎么出差的事儿总是让你去。那什么时候回来?
en: Tell me, why is it that you are always the one going on business trips? When will you be back?

zh: 别修了，索性买一副新的吧。
en: Don't bother repairing it, just go and buy a new pair.

zh: 不买不行啊，总不能明年结婚连个住的地方都没有吧?
en: I must buy one, after all, I can't get married next year without having a place to live, can I?

zh: 寒假一般什么都做不了，只能回家过春节了。
en: I usually can't do anything during the winter break, I can only go home for the Spring Festival.

zh: 是啊，学生们都着急回家嘛。
en: Yes, the students are all eager to go home.

zh: 请问这里是十排十四号吗?
en: Excuse me, is this row ten, seat fourteen?

zh: 其他地方都合适，就是颜色浅了点儿。
en: Everything else is fine, but the color is a bit light.

zh: 好，你多喝点儿水，好好儿休息。
en: Alright, drink more water and get plenty of rest.

zh: 有歌舞、小品，还有京剧。
en: There are songs and dances, skits, and also Beijing opera.

zh: 我那时真不想离开你们这些好朋友。
en: I really didn't want to leave you all, my good friends, at that time.

zh: 出房间左转，一直走，过了柜台右转就是了。
en: Turn left when you exit the room, go straight, and after passing the counter, turn right.

zh: 你好，张东!现在有时间吗?想和你一起聊聊天儿。
en: Hi, Zhang Dong! Do you have time now? I'd like to chat with you.

zh: 小王最近都没有来上班，他是不是发生什么事情了?
en: Xiao Wang hasn't come to work recently. Has something happened to him?
